---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for KKF
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the feature is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Motivation

Why do you want this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like the feature to work:

```python
# Example of how the feature might be used:
from KKF import ...

# Your proposed API or usage
result = function_with_new_feature(...)
```

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Any plots, diagrams, or other context?

## References

Any related issues, discussions, or external references?

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked existing issues and discussions for similar requests
- [ ] This feature would be useful for others (not just me)
- [ ] I have provided a clear use case and motivation
- [ ] I have considered potential impacts on the API or performance
